content: Front is at 0.82 m in CAUTION—passable but tight; do not move forward aggressively. Front-left and front-right are both in CAUTION (1.05 m and 0.84 m respectively); all other sectors are clear. Proceed forward slowly if the goal is ahead, or rotate left toward the slightly more open front-left sector (1.05 m) if you need to maneuver. Watch the front-right side at 0.84 m if turning right.
